title: scolosanthus sagranus
intro: Scolosanthus sagranus is a plant species, also known as the yellow flowered Scolosanthus, which belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and fever, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Scolosanthus sagranus has been traditionally used to relieve coughs and congestion, making it beneficial for people suffering from bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as dried and used in capsules or powders for easier consumption and preservation.
